calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-19-2012 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-05-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-05-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-01-12 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Thomas J. Williams, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff: Christina Ouyang.
Ira Spratley, Esq. for and with the Defendants: Lloyd Klein and Barney Klein.
Case settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Settlement amount of $26,000.00 to be made with in a week by way of standard release to be executed by the parties, each to bear own fees, costs and liens, and Plaintiff to dismiss the action with prejudice.
Parties agreed to terms on the record, matter was deemed settled by the court, and was set on the CRC dismissal calendar for 05-01-12 at 10 a.m. in Dept. 610.
